history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man stands in a modern billiard hall, facing away from the camera and towards a pool table. He is wearing a black t-shirt with pink text on the back that reads "Certified Your Boi," and loose white pants. He is holding a pool cue in his right hand. The pool table has a bright blue felt surface and is set up with several billiard balls, including a cue ball and some colored balls. The table is illuminated by long, rectangular ceiling lights that cast a bright, cool-toned light. The background features a wall with vertical wooden slats and horizontal accent lighting, creating a sophisticated and contemporary atmosphere. The floor is covered with a patterned carpet in shades of dark blue and teal. The overall mood is relaxed and focused, with a sense of quiet anticipation before a game of pool. The lighting is strong and creates some highlights and shadows, emphasizing the modern interior design. The color palette is dominated by blues, grays, and the warm glow of the accent lights.
